create: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS messages (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, chat_id INT NOT NULL, sender_id INT NOT NULL, content TEXT NOT NULL, sent_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (chat_id) REFERENCES chats(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (sender_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
insert: INSERT INTO messages (chat_id, sender_id, content) VALUES (%s, %s, %s);
update: UPDATE messages SET content = %s WHERE id = %s;

fetch.by_id: SELECT id, chat_id, sender_id, content, sent_at FROM messages WHERE id = %s;
fetch.by_chat: SELECT m.id, m.chat_id, m.content, m.sent_at, u.id AS sender_id, u.username AS sender_username, u.email AS sender_email FROM messages m JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.chat_id = %s ORDER BY m.sent_at ASC;
fetch.new_messages: SELECT m.id, m.chat_id, m.content, m.sent_at, u.id AS sender_id, u.username AS sender_username, u.email AS sender_email FROM messages m JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.chat_id = %s AND m.id > %s ORDER BY m.sent_at ASC;
fetch.last_message: SELECT content FROM messages WHERE chat_id = %s ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 1;
